---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What would you like to see added or changed?

## Use Case
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve for your setup?

## Your Setup
- **Mode:** (e.g. single toolhead, toolchanger, AFC/BoxTurtle)
- **Tag format:** (e.g. OpenPrintTag, TigerTag, OpenTag3D)
- **Hardware:** (e.g. ESP32-S3 Zero + AITRIP PN5180)

## Additional Context
Any mockups, links, or examples of how this works elsewhere.
